subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the remembrance of those illustrious souls, Jinab-i-Mashhadi Husayn, thy father, and Mashhadi Rida, thine uncle, in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن شخص بزرگوار جناب مشهدی حسین ابوی و مشهدی رضای عمو فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power; influence of a single soul in teaching the Cause
